name: Preference-Conditioned Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning for Runtime-Tunable Transit Signal Priority

description: arXiv:2607.18286v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Transit signal priority (TSP) requires balancing competing objectives: reducing bus delay while limiting adverse impacts on non-bus traffic and avoiding extreme waits for a subset of vehicles. Existing reinforcement-learning (RL) approaches to TSP typically encode transit-aware features (e.g., occupancy and schedule deviation) but optimize a fix...
author: Philip-Roman Adam, Stefanie Schmidtner
